items.title_en: Waymo recalls 3,800 robotaxis after glitch allowed some vehicles to 'drive into standing water'

items.title_en: Trump says Makary is out as FDA commissioner, following industry and White House backlash
items.title_zh: 在业界和白宫强烈反对后，特朗普表示马卡里不再担任 FDA 专员
items.desc_en: Makary's tenure was marked by internal dysfunction at the FDA, leadership turmoil and mounting backlash from drugmakers and physicians on regulatory decisions.
items.desc_zh: 马卡里在任期间的特点是 FDA 内部功能失调、领导层混乱以及制药商和医生对监管决策的强烈反对。

items.desc_en: Yoweri Museveni, 81, won disputed elections in January to extend his 40-year rule.
items.desc_zh: 81 岁的约韦里·穆塞韦尼 (Yoweri Museveni) 在 1 月份赢得了有争议的选举，延长了他 40 年的统治。

items.desc_zh: 她在一次欧盟峰会上表示，专家小组将于 7 月份就如何保护未成年人上网制定措施。

items.title_zh: 墨西哥取消为世界杯提前结束学年的计划
items.desc_en: Parents were angry at a proposal to end classes on 5 June instead of 15 July due to the tournament and expected extreme heat.

items.desc_zh: Canvas 背后的公司表示，它已经与扰乱数千所学院和大学的黑客“达成协议”。

items.title_en: Texas accuses Netflix of spying on users, including children
items.title_zh: 德克萨斯州指控 Netflix 监视用户，包括儿童
items.desc_en: The lawsuit comes amid increased scrutiny over platform features like auto-play that deliver endless content to users.
items.desc_zh: 此次诉讼发生之际，人们对自动播放等向用户提供无尽内容的平台功能进行了越来越严格的审查。

items.title_en: No sign of larger hantavirus outbreak, says UN health agency
items.title_zh: 联合国卫生机构称，没有迹象表明存在更大规模的汉坦病毒爆发
items.desc_en: The situation could still change and there might be more confirmed cases, warns the head of the World Health Organization.
items.desc_zh: 世界卫生组织负责人警告说，情况仍可能发生变化，可能会出现更多确诊病例。

items.title_en: Starmer defiant as ministers quit and demand his exit — as-it-happened - politico.eu
items.title_zh: 斯塔默在部长们辞职并要求他退出时挑衅 - 事实 - politico.eu
items.desc_en: Starmer defiant as ministers quit and demand his exit — as-it-happened  politico.euWho could challenge Keir Starmer as prime minister?  BBCU.K. Prime Minister Starmer defiant as calls for his resignat

items.title_en: Snack giant switches to black and white packaging as Iran war hits ink supplies
items.title_zh: 由于伊朗战争影响墨水供应，零食巨头转向黑白包装
items.desc_en: The effective closure of the Strait of Hormuz has severely disrupted global supplies of energy and petrochemicals.
items.desc_zh: 霍尔木兹海峡的有效关闭严重扰乱了全球能源和石化产品的供应。

items.title_en: Not so dusty: How tech is changing woodworking
items.title_zh: 不那么尘土飞扬：科技如何改变木工
items.desc_en: Woodworking shops have been transformed by tech to make tools safer and more precise.
items.desc_zh: 木工车间已经被技术改造，使工具更安全、更精确。

items.title_en: Trump says Iran ceasefire is on 'massive life support'
items.title_zh: 特朗普称伊朗停火是“巨大的生命支持”
items.desc_en: The US president criticises an Iranian counteroffer to end the war, and says the month-long ceasefire is "unbelievably weak".
items.desc_zh: 美国总统批评伊朗提出的结束战争的还价，并表示为期一个月的停火“软弱得令人难以置信”。

items.title_en: TikTok launches £3.99 subscription for no ads in UK
items.title_zh: TikTok 在英国推出 3.99 英镑无广告订阅服务
items.desc_en: Those who don't subscribe will be able to use the platform for free - but be shown personalised ads by default.
items.desc_zh: 那些不订阅的人将能够免费使用该平台 - 但默认情况下会显示个性化广告。

items.title_en: TikTok rows back AI video descriptions in US after absurd errors

items.desc_zh: 虽然仅向部分 TikTok 用户推出，但该功能由人工智能生成的奇异描述却被广泛分享。

items.title_zh: Instagram 隐私技术今天关闭 - 这对您的私信意味着什么？

items.desc_zh: 该平台表示将删除端到端加密消息，这是母公司 Meta 的一个重大转变。

items.desc_zh: 能够捕获热量的分子可能是一种有用的供暖脱碳技术。

items.title_en: Meta brings High Court challenge over Ofcom fees
items.title_zh: Meta brings High Court challenge over Ofcom fees
items.desc_en: Meta said Ofcom's calculations were "disproportionate"; the regulator said it would defend its position.
items.desc_zh: Meta表示Ofcom的计算“不成比例”； the regulator said it would defend its position.

items.title_zh: 观看：无人机在英国运送第一批亚马逊包裹
items.desc_en: The tech giant says it hopes to slowly expand the service as the demand for ultra-fast deliveries grows.
items.desc_zh: 这家科技巨头表示，随着对超快速交付的需求的增长，它希望慢慢扩大这项服务。

items.title_en: In 'Musk v Altman', this judge will make the final call
items.title_zh: 在“马斯克诉奥特曼”中，这位法官将做出最终决定
items.desc_en: The feud has fuelled a costly showdown between two tech titans.
items.desc_zh: 这场不和加剧了两家科技巨头之间代价高昂的摊牌。

items.title_en: Former OpenAI board member says Elon Musk offered her sperm donations
items.title_zh: 前 OpenAI 董事会成员表示埃隆·马斯克愿意捐献她的精子
items.desc_en: Shivon Zilis is the mother of four of Musk's children. That relationship began as she advised OpenAI.
items.desc_zh: Shivon Zilis 是马斯克四个孩子的母亲。这种关系始于她为 OpenAI 提供建议时。
